name: PLASMA young plasma Alzheimer disease trial
summary: A small young plasma infusion study in mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease with randomized crossover and open-label components.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Circulating Factor Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes safety and function in People with mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
